name: A Healthy Home, LLC
description: Home inspection, mold testing, radon testing, and asbestos testing services in the Denver metro area, offering high quality service at competitive prices.

name: Abbotts Cleanup & Restoration
description: Professional mold inspection using moisture meters and infrared cameras for thorough property assessments.

name: Axium Inspections
description: Nationally certified for mold inspections and testing, experienced with commercial and residential mold inspections throughout Colorado.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Jon Handy was exceptional. Really knows his stuff, was super thorough in his explanations
Bradin was super friendly efficient and great to work with during my home inspection
Tim was SO wonderful and thorough. He found significant, deal breaking issues
They showed up on time, did a thorough inspection and found key items that needed to be addressed

sentiment.summary: Axium Inspections has an exceptional reputation with uniformly positive reviews highlighting professional, thorough inspectors who excel at clear communication and identifying critical home issues.

name: Colorado Mold Services, LLC
description: Mold testing and remediation specialists in Denver.

name: Mold Inspection & Testing
description: Leading mold inspection and testing company offering services without conflict of interest, using infrared cameras, moisture meters, air/surface sampling for indoor air quality assessment. Does not handle mold removal.

name: Mold Inspection Sciences
description: Expert mold inspection and testing services including mold detection, CIRS protocol, post-remediation clearance testing, drinking water testing, and environmental risk assessments. They only perform inspection and testing, never remediation.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Johnny and team were the ONLY inspectors that found root causes to water intrusion and possible mold locations.
Patrick was extremely helpful! Super informative and ultimately saved my families life!!
He is the best of the best! A project manager who really understands how to explain what, why, when and where mold/mycotoxin tests need to be taken.
I was impressed with Frank's thoroughness and professionalism throughout his inspection.

sentiment.summary: Mold Inspection Sciences has an exceptionally positive reputation, with reviewers consistently praising their inspectors' professionalism, expertise, and thoroughness in detecting mold issues that competitors missed.

name: Pure Maintenance of Colorado, LLC
description: Mold testing and remediation specialists in Denver.

name: Rex Environmental
description: State licensed and insured inspectors providing mold, asbestos, and lead testing with same-day results, 24/7 availability, comprehensive environmental testing and consulting for home and commercial properties.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: He is extremely professional. He also listened to my concerns. He was compassionate and polite.
They typically have result within less than 24 hrs. so you can keep the project moving forward.
Eric and his team are wonderful. We called them in a panic and they were able to come out same day.
Rex is the best environmental company I have worked with thus far.

sentiment.summary: Rex Environmental has an exceptional reputation with consistently positive reviews praising their professional staff, rapid turnaround times, courteous service, and expertise in environmental testing.
